objective: resolve performance degradation from heavy analytical queries running alongside transactional workloads causing query timeouts, slow response times, and production incidents. establish single source of truth for historical data to eliminate inconsistent numbers across dashboards, reports, and ml pipelines. develop a new data pipeline to extract data from mysql source database to bigquery target
business_context: Production transactional systems are experiencing performance issues due to analytical queries running alongside operational workloads. Multiple systems are showing inconsistent data across dashboards, reports, and ML pipelines, indicating need for centralized data architecture.
functional_requirements: Extract all historical data from MySQL source database to BigQuery
Perform full historical load of in-scope source tables
Implement automated data reconciliation between source and target
Create centralized analytics store in BigQuery
Eliminate analytical query load from transactional systems

non_functional.performance: eliminate query timeouts and slow response times in production

security.access_controls: controlled access to source database credentials

constraints.technical_limitations: zero tolerance for data discrepancies, pipeline must halt on any validation failure

acceptance_criteria: Row count in BigQuery raw table equals row count in source table at time of extraction
Automated reconciliation query run post-load with results logged to pipeline_audit.pipeline_run_log
Count(*) in BigQuery raw table for extraction window must equal count(*) in source table for same window with zero tolerance
Any discrepancy triggers pipeline halt and alert
Validation applied after every extract task for every table, every run
expected_outputs: Full historical load of all in-scope source tables loaded into BigQuery raw dataset
Verified row counts matching source tables
Centralized analytics store eliminating performance issues
BigQuery dataset verizon_data_deah with employees table
Automated reconciliation results logged to pipeline_audit.pipeline_run_log

project name: network 5g core requirement type: new_dvlp stakeholder: john objective resolve performance degradation from heavy analytical queries running alongside transactional workloads causing query timeouts, slow response times, and production incidents. establish single source of truth for historical data to eliminate inconsistent numbers across dashboards, reports, and ml pipelines. develop a new data pipeline to extract data from mysql source database (verizon-data:us-central1:mysql-druid-metadatastore) to bigquery target (verizon-data project, verizon_data_deah dataset) to resolve performance degradation caused by analytical queries running alongside transactional workloads and establish centralized analytics store. expected outcome full historical load of all in-scope source tables loaded into bigquery raw dataset with verified row counts, eliminating performance issues and providing centralized analytics store connections and db details source: verizon-data:us-central1:mysql-druid-metadatastore, ip:34.70.79.163, port:3306, database:agentichub, table:employees, username:sa. target: bigquery gcp project:verizon-data, dataset:verizon_data_deah, table:employees acceptance criteria success conditions: row count in bigquery raw table equals row count in source table at time of extraction automated reconciliation query run post-load with results logged to pipeline_audit.pipeline_run_log validation rules: count(*) in bigquery raw table for extraction window must equal count(*) in source table for same window with zero tolerance any discrepancy triggers pipeline halt and alert applied after every extract task for every table, every run
